name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️ Long card holder with GG details. Gucci's iconic GG elements are cleverly combined with vibrant colors. This long card holder is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, subtly incorporating black contrasting details to bring a subtle contrast beauty to this small daily accessory. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, brass hardware with black ceramic finish, cloud print fabric lining, GG details. Inside: Eight card slots.
name_cn:
!!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️ Long card holder with GG details. Gucci's iconic GG elements are cleverly combined with vibrant colors. This long card holder is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, subtly incorporating black contrasting details to bring a subtle contrast beauty to this small daily accessory. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, brass hardware with black ceramic finish, cloud print fabric lining, GG details. Inside: Eight card slots.
Model: 768249.
Open size: 12(L) x 15cm(W)
Closed size: 12(L) x 7.5cm(W)
Color: Cognac/Brown PVC.
Made in Italy
Weight: approx. 0.085kg
